# Feature plan template

Copy this when proposing a new feature or implementation plan for a Wear OS app.

```markdown
## Summary
- What user-facing behavior changes (1–3 bullets)

## Files to touch
- `...`

## Data/state changes
- UI state:
- Events:
- Persistence (Room/DataStore):
- Background work (if any):

## Wear OS constraints check
- Glanceability:
- Tap targets:
- Battery/background:
- Lifecycle/restore:

## Test plan
- On-watch manual checks (key flows + edge cases):
```

Fill in each section; use the [review checklist](../review-checklist.md) and [performance & battery](../perf-battery.md) notes to double-check constraints and test plan.
